message:
fix(pattern-learning): compilation fixes and test correctness

- Add pattern_learning module exports to supervision/mod.rs
- Add From<String> impl and Validation variant to SignatureError
- Add with_parent_patterns builder method to SupervisorSignature
- Add with_config method to PatternLibrary for test compatibility
- Fix duplicate imports in pattern_learning_e2e.rs tests
- Fix accept/reject semantics in record_decision (spare=accept, kill=reject)
- Fix test expectations for pattern names (learned_node_exact vs learned_node_std)
- Fix type annotation in signature_tests.rs closure
- Remove unused Deserialize import from prior_override.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
